description: Style Note Crafted from pure leather, this fossil belt has a refined finish complemented by its smart gunmetal buckle. Fossil leather breathes, regulates temperature to suit the climate, prevents dust penetration and has high ripping resistance that makes it a must-have in your wardrobe! Product Details Black belt made of leather and has perforations on the front for style Tang clasp with a double prong buckle and fixed loop to offer a snug Fit and to hold the belt in place Holes to customise fit Branding embossed at the end of the beltMaterial and Care Leather Use a brass polish to maintain buckle shine Use a branded leather conditioner to protect the belt
